title: AI Model Comparison Explorer

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: AI Model Comparison Explorer

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
  <rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' rx='10' fill='#090a0f'/>
  <rect x='30' y='30' width='340' height='20' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <text x='40' y='45' font-size='24' fill='#B7D7CD'>AI Model Comparison</text>
  <g transform='translate(50, 90)' fill='#411C56'>
    <rect x='-10' y='-10' width='20' height='20' rx='10'/>
    <rect x='0' y='-10' width='20' height='20' rx='10'/>
    <rect x='10' y='-10' width='20' height='20' rx='10'/>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(120, 90)' fill='#B7D7CD'>
    <text x='-10' y='0' font-size='18'>Model</text>
    <text x='0' y='0' font-size='18'>Name</text>
    <text x='10' y='0' font-size='18'>Accuracy</text>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(210, 120)' fill='#C06C88'>
    <rect x='-10' y='-10' width='20' height='20' rx='10'/>
    <rect x='0' y='-10' width='20' height='20' rx='10'/>
    <rect x='10' y='-10' width='20' height='20' rx='10'/>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(220, 130)'>
    <rect x='-10' y='-10' width='20' height='20' rx='10' fill='#411C56'/>
    <rect x='0' y='-10' width='20' height='20' rx='10' fill='#411C56'/>
    <rect x='10' y='-10' width='20' height='20' rx='10' fill='#411C56'/>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(290, 120)' fill='#B7D7CD'>
    <text x='-10' y='0' font-size='18'>Description</text>
    <text x='0' y='0' font-size='18'>Metrics</text>
    <text x='10' y='0' font-size='18'>Compare</text>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(350, 120)' fill='#C06C88'>
    <rect x='-10' y='-10' width='20' height='20' rx='10'/>
    <rect x='0' y='-10' width='20' height='20' rx='10'/>
    <rect x='10' y='-10' width='20' height='20' rx='10'/>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(360, 130)'>
    <rect x='-10' y='-10' width='20' height='20' rx='10' fill='#411C56'/>
    <rect x='0' y='-10' width='20' height='20' rx='10' fill='#411C56'/>
    <rect x='10' y='-10' width='20' height='20' rx='10' fill='#411C56'/>
  </g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must implement a navigation bar with a model selector
Must include a grid of model cards with key statistics and performance metrics

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: AI Model Comparison Explorer

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, model selector functionality, and model card hover effects.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
